name: LLR Verified
description: Low-level requirements / design are verified by review or analysis.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-4: low-level requirements and software architecture are verified for compliance, accuracy and consistency. Reviews of design are not required at DAL D.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
